# Chat LLM disabled: verify the chat view + runner compile and the
# no-API-key path is exercised without any network call. The TUI itself
# requires a TTY, so we exercise the path indirectly via `sin-code tui`
# help text. Users running locally can set SIN_NIM_API_KEY to enable the
# full chat submit + LLM roundtrip.
env SIN_NIM_API_KEY=
env SIN_LLM_API_KEY=
env SIN_LLM_OFFLINE=1
sin-code tui --help
stdout 'Launch the interactive multi-pane TUI'
! stdout 'panic'
! stdout 'undefined'
! stdout 'runtime error'
